/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Xlinker -undefined -Xlinker dynamic_lookup -o Release/uml001.so CMakeFiles/uml001.dir/src/python/uml001_bindings.cpp.o   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/libsodium/1.0.21/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/libsodium/1.0.21/lib Release/libuml001_core.a -lsodium /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libcrypto.dylib
